1.premise: Ozempic could be a spare medication tossed onstage.
Skinny dipping could be fat splashing.

3.premise: Saving Latina contacts under Mexican food names is a relationship-ending offense.

1.premise: "Dora" sounds like "torta", and "torta" fits because a Latina girlfriend likes restaurants.

2.premise: A Latina aunt is like a Latina girlfriend because both can be saved as Mexican foods.

lines.text: I haven't had a chance to get medicated yet tonight.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Does anybody have a spare ozumpik
lines.label: setup

lines.text: they could throw up on stage.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I could really use that shit.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Has anybody in here ever gone fat splashing before?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's what I call skinny dipping.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I used to date this Latina.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She would make me drive her really far
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The reason she broke up with me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: she found out her name in my phone was Torta the Explorer.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah, that fucked me up, that was hard.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It was even rougher that I had her aunt in my phone
lines.label: setup

lines.text: All right guys, that's been my time, Big Vinnie.
lines.label: fluff
